name: s7g-icp-governance
description: ICP canister governance — multi-sig management, provenance sync, on-chain audit trail verification. Powered by shroud_orchestrator canister.

skills.name: Sync Ledger to ICP
skills.description: Sync S7G SQLite ledger entries to the ICP canister for on-chain provenance

skills.name: Verify On-Chain Entry
skills.description: Verify a ledger entry exists on the ICP canister with correct signature

skills.name: Manage Governors
skills.description: Add, remove, or list multi-sig governors on the ICP canister
